title: Three Doors
description: More suspects, more possibilities. One aspect clue leaves three valid alchemicals — check every door.

hints.text: Ingredient 1 is R+G−B− (fully identified). The G− clue for ingredient 2 tells you its Green aspect is negative. List all alchemicals with G−.
G− alchemicals: R+G−B+, R−G−B+, and NNN. (Alch 3 itself is taken.) Mix each with R+G−B− and note whether they match or differ on each axis.
mix(R+G−B−, R+G−B+) = G−, mix(R+G−B−, R−G−B+) = neutral, mix(R+G−B−, NNN) = B−. Answer: G−, Neutral, B−.
